lessons.title: Press Play — see your game breathe
lessons.goal: Understand Level, Actor, and the Play button.
steps: Open level Lvl_ArenaShooter in Content Browser
Click the green Play button (or Alt+P)
Move with WASD, look with mouse, shoot with left click
Press Esc to stop Play mode
lessons.concept: A Level is the world. Actors are things inside it. Play lets you test without building a full game.

lessons.title: Meet the Content Browser
lessons.concept: Everything your game owns lives in Content/. Blueprints hold logic. Maps are levels.

lessons.title: Your first change — add light
lessons.goal: Place an actor and see the world change.
lessons.concept: Dragging actors into the viewport changes the level immediately.

lessons.title: Score when you hit a target
lessons.goal: Connect shooting to feedback the player understands.
lessons.concept: Game feel = action + response. UI and sound make hits satisfying.
